response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior generalist (TypeScript/Node, DLang, full-stack) but lacks the mandatory profile for this role: no recent or substantial hands-on C++ on Windows, no SQL Server/Oracle experience, and no Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain background. The only C/C++ exposure (National Instruments, 2014–2015) is over a decade old and brief. Mandatory criteria are not met.
strengths: Senior engineer with 10+ years across web, backend, and embedded systems
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development
Some prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on developer tooling
concerns: No recent C++ experience; only ~6 months over a decade ago, not on a Windows-focused stack
No SQL Server or Oracle experience listed; SQL background is MySQL/MongoDB-oriented
No Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain experience
